phases.name: Environment Stabilization
phases.description: Fix missing dependencies and environment configuration to allow tests to run.

phases.name: Critical Code Repairs
phases.description: Fix import errors and broken references preventing application startup.

phases.name: Security Hardening
phases.description: Address high-confidence security vulnerabilities identified by Bandit.
items: Refactor SQL injection vulnerabilities in 'core/mcp/registry.py' and 'core/memory/engine.py' to use parameterized queries.

phases.name: Code Hygiene & Standardization
phases.description: Enforce linting, typing, and documentation standards.
items: Resolve Flake8 unused imports and formatting errors.
Add missing docstrings to core modules.

notes: Execution logs preserved in `data/lakehouse/exec_agent.jsonl` and analyzed in `docs/development_notes.md`.

Note on edgar mismatch: The 'edgar' package uses 'httpxthrottlecache' which is incompatible with modern 'pyrate-limiter' due to a constructor signature change for 'Limiter'. The environment was patched via sed in the test runner, but a long-term upstream fix is needed.
Celery was already added to dependencies during environment stabilization. The services.webapp.api dependency on celery is now functional.

Security Hardening: Parameterized queries used in registry/engine, permissions fixed in setup script, 0.0.0.0 bind removed from core/api/main.py. Exec usage in core/security/sandbox.py was already well guarded by a restricted `safe_globals` dict with `__builtins__` disabled, as well as strict AST validation. It's appropriately hardened.

Code Hygiene & Standardization: Resolved Flake8 unused imports, formatting, and line length issues. Evaluated missing docstrings and added where required (though mostly already covered). Did not run global `--fix` across entire codebase to avoid noisy massive diffs unrelated to this specific review/remediation.
